hero.title: From first invite to final dashboard – fully automated online surveys.
hero.content: We design and run online surveys that work across devices, languages and markets. From sampling to reporting, processes can be fully automated while quality stays under control.

card.subtitle: One pipeline, many markets
card.title: International online fieldwork under one roof.
card.content: From invitations and reminders to quotas and redirects: we keep all steps of the online survey process in-house, ensuring consistent quality and documentation for every country.
card.caption: Use the sections below to explore design, process and automation in more detail.

why.title: A standard method for international projects.
why.content: Online surveys are part of our standard repertoire and are used as a central method within international surveys. From the first invite to the final report, all processes can be fully automated.

items.title: Speed & scalability
items.text: Reach thousands of respondents within days instead of weeks, with clear turnaround times and predictable costs.

items.title: International consistency
items.text: Use one core questionnaire, adapted to local languages and markets, while keeping your KPIs aligned.

items.title: Clean, structured data
items.text: Routing, validation and automated quality checks ensure that your datasets are ready for modelling and reporting.

process.title: One pipeline from survey design to reporting.
process.content: Explore how we move from questionnaire and invites through fieldwork and data processing into dashboards and exports.

steps.label: Survey design & invites
steps.desc: We design online questionnaires that work across devices, using clear routing and smart validation so respondents can complete them quickly and reliably.

steps.label: Fieldwork & data processing
steps.desc: Data processing includes automated plausibility checks, coding of open answers and preparation of all relevant variables for reporting and modelling.

steps.label: Reporting & exports
steps.desc: Results are loaded into online dashboards or static reports. Standard figures can be scheduled, while ad-hoc filters let you explore sub-groups on demand.
details: Exports to BI tools or data-lake

process.wheel_text: From survey design through processing to reporting – one connected pipeline.

automation.title: Online surveys that plug into your reporting landscape.
automation.content: Whether you prefer dashboards, slide decks or raw data exports – we build a reporting layer that matches your organisation and connects to existing tools instead of adding yet another silo.
automation.toggle_hint: Toggle between automation, integration and alerts to see how we connect online surveys with your existing infrastructure.

modes.label: Automation
modes.headline: Automated from invite to export.
modes.text: Invites, reminders, quotas and redirects can be automated across waves and countries – with documentation and monitoring in the background.

modes.label: Integration
modes.headline: Connected to your systems.
modes.text: Survey data can be streamed into your data warehouse or BI tools, using stable schemas and IDs that match your internal structures.

modes.label: Alerts
modes.headline: Alerts when things go wrong.
modes.text: Threshold-based alerts signal when satisfaction drops or when quotas, samples or technical KPIs behave unexpectedly.
